title: Cannot delete certain boards in Monday Dev
excerpt:
I have two boards (Sprints and Tasks) at root level under a workspace. I can’t delete either board neither can I archive them so I’m left with two boards I don’t want. 
How do I delete these two boards?

posts.author: mrhavercamp (mrhavercamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have two boards (Sprints and Tasks) at root level under a workspace. I can’t delete either board neither can I archive them so I’m left with two boards I don’t want.

How do I delete these two boards?

posts.author: mrhavercamp (mrhavercamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Okay it seems you can move boards that cannot be deleted into a Folder then delete the folder which archives the boards. Is there any way to delete an archived board?

posts.author: matous (Jan)
posts.cookedHtml: اعتقد لا توجد طريقة لحذف اللوحة المؤرشفة
